; the UI normalizes it to Bluetooth MAC: ; the UI normalizes it to Bluetooth MAC format.
Add Device and Enable Live Polling: Add Device and Enable Live Polling
Apply this history window to every selec: Apply this history window to every selected Fleet Trend chart.
BM200, BM200 Pro, BM300, and BM300 Pro a: BM200, BM200 Pro, BM300, and BM300 Pro app families all expose lead-acid and lithium setup paths. Lead-acid supports regular, AGM, EFB, GEL, and custom. Lithium supports lithium and custom. Custom profiles can use the intelligent algorithm or a voltage-to-SoC curve. The gateway now generates the device ID automatically and assigns the visual badges from the battery and vehicle metadata you choose below.
BM200/BM6 protocol state order: Critical: Ordre des etats du protocole BM200/BM6 : Critique, Faible, Normal, En charge, Maintien. Etat actuel : Normal.
Battery charge is low and should be rech: La charge de la batterie est faible et doit etre retablie bientot.

Battery is in a critically low or alarm: La batterie est dans un etat critique ou en alarme.
Bluetooth adapter recovery triggered: Recuperation de l adaptateur Bluetooth declenchee
Choose how many batteries can appear on: Choose how many batteries can appear on one overview image.

Controls how long the gateway searches f: Controls how long the gateway searches for each Bluetooth device before giving up.

Device discovery payloads: Charges utiles de découverte des appareils
Edit the same battery taxonomy exposed b: Edit the same battery taxonomy exposed by the official app, including custom curves. Battery and vehicle badges are assigned automatically.
Expose generated frame images through a: Expose generated frame images through a Raspberry Pi USB gadget mass storage drive. This remains inactive until the USB gadget hardware path is available.

Keeps discovery messages on the broker s: Keeps discovery messages on the broker so Home Assistant can rediscover the gateway after restarts.

The reboot command was accepted by the g: The reboot command was accepted by the gateway.

This mirrors the official-app custom bat: This mirrors the official-app custom battery flow. Edit the per-10% thresholds if you want a manual SoC curve instead of the intelligent algorithm.
This page keeps checking the web interfa: This page keeps checking the web interface and redirects when the gateway is online again.
